ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Women, Men, Kids) */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise measurement (for pants) */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement (for pants) */,
  "outseam" REAL /* Outseam measurement (for pants) */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement */,
  "hip_length" REAL /* Hip length measurement (for dresses and skirts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Dress, Pants, Coat) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Women, Men, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the product in this size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product size was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Stock level threshold for reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs to images attached to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
